title: Scurrula cultarum
taxonomy: Scurrula cultarum is classified as a species within the genus Scurrula and family Santalaceae. This plant is a hemiparasitic shrub native to Southeast Asia. The Santalaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as mistletoes, which are known for their unique parasitic relationships with other plants. Scurrula cultarum is one of the species within the Santalaceae family that exhibits hemiparasitic characteristics.
